summary: PASS. Coder v28 (033c8290) closed all three v1 findings cleanly. report.cs now routes through Channels (finding #3); Diagnostics renamed Diagnostics/Format.cs with class App.Diagnostics.Format and method renamed Format→Value to dodge collision (finding #2); TypeMappingTestFacade.Json.CaseInsensitiveRead now forwards to Conversion._caseInsensitiveRead via internal accessor (finding #1). Both test suites green on clean rebuild (C# 2752/2752, PLang 199/199). Branch ready to merge to runtime2.

previous_reviews_assessed.coder_v28: agree — all three fixes shipped at the right locations in the right shapes; the Format→Value method rename was an unbriefed but defensible judgment call (avoids Format.Format(...) collision)
previous_reviews_assessed.codeanalyzer: v3 verdict still stands — fix pass did not touch the audited surfaces
previous_reviews_assessed.security: v1 verdict still stands — no trust-boundary changes in the fix pass
